conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to a conference organizer to ask about registration details.
org_constraint: The phrase "Could you please provide more information?" must appear at least once.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "provide" in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to a conference organizer to ask about registration details. The phrase "Could you please provide more information?" must appear at least once. Avoid using the keyword "provide" in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding [Conference Name] Registration

Dear [Organizer Name or Conference Team],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am very interested in attending the upcoming [Conference Name] on [Dates of Conference], and I'm eager to secure my spot.

I was hoping you could share some details concerning the registration process. Specifically, I'm looking for information on available ticket types, the associated costs, and the deadlines for signing up.

Could you please furnish further details regarding these aspects? Any guidance you can offer on how to complete the registration would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Affiliation, if applicable]<turn|>
